_comment: Same as cube_skewed_corner but segments=5 (odd). BV positions and cap-arc samples (i, 0, k) match Blender exactly via the unit-cube affine map, but cap interior bilinear (i, j>0, k>0) deviates ~0.018 worst because Blender's canonical unit-cube cap for non-power-of-2 seg uses cubic_subdiv (Catmull-Clark) on the seg=2 mesh subsampled to seg=5, while we still bilinear-interpolate in the unit-frame. Closing this needs a port of Blender's cubic_subdiv + interp_vmesh inside make_cube_corner_adj_vmesh.
